news.title:
Crisil reaffirmed Anupam Rasayan's long-term rating at A and short-term at A1.
The Rating Watch with Negative Implications has been removed as of March 18, 2026.
news.summary:
Crisil reaffirmed Anupam Rasayan's long-term rating at A and short-term at A1.
The Rating Watch with Negative Implications has been removed as of March 18, 2026.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan acquires 100% stake in Jayhawk Fine Chemicals for $150M.
The deal, financed via $109M shares and $41M debt, boosts global presence and EPS.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan acquires 100% stake in Jayhawk Fine Chemicals for $150M.
The deal, financed via $109M shares and $41M debt, boosts global presence and EPS.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd completes acquisition of Monitchem Kansas S.r.l. and its subsidiaries.
Details shared under Regulation 30 of LODR; updates available on company website.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd completes acquisition of Monitchem Kansas S.r.l. and its subsidiaries.
Details shared under Regulation 30 of LODR; updates available on company website.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan secures $30M ECB loan from Axis Bank for Monitchem Kansas acquisition.
The loan is backed by mortgaged assets and also covers related expenses.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan secures $30M ECB loan from Axis Bank for Monitchem Kansas acquisition.
The loan is backed by mortgaged assets and also covers related expenses.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan targets 25-30% revenue growth and 25% margins.
Fluorination share to rise from 25% to 33%; working capital days to drop to 220.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan targets 25-30% revenue growth and 25% margins.
Fluorination share to rise from 25% to 33%; working capital days to drop to 220.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd disclosed agreements for USD 50M credit facilities and USD 150M corporate guarantees.
The funds will be used for acquisitions and related transactions under secured financing terms.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd disclosed agreements for USD 50M credit facilities and USD 150M corporate guarantees.
The funds will be used for acquisitions and related transactions under secured financing terms.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd shared audio recording of earnings call for Q3 & 9M ending Dec 31, 2025.
Recording is available on the company's website as per Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd shared audio recording of earnings call for Q3 & 9M ending Dec 31, 2025.
Recording is available on the company's website as per Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan Q3 profit rose 11.6% YoY to ₹60.5 crore; revenue grew 31.4% YoY to ₹512.4 crore.
EBITDA margin fell to 24.9% from 31.8% due to higher costs; total expenses surged to ₹454.6 crore.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan Q3 profit rose 11.6% YoY to ₹60.5 crore; revenue grew 31.4% YoY to ₹512.4 crore.
EBITDA margin fell to 24.9% from 31.8% due to higher costs; total expenses surged to ₹454.6 crore.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan India acquired 100% stake in Doriath S.à r.l., Luxembourg.
Acquisition completed on 10 Feb 2026 for EUR 7,024.8 in cash.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan India acquired 100% stake in Doriath S.à r.l., Luxembourg.
Acquisition completed on 10 Feb 2026 for EUR 7,024.8 in cash.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan's board meeting on Feb 14, 2026, will review unaudited financial results.
The results cover Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, in both standalone and consolidated formats.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan's board meeting on Feb 14, 2026, will review unaudited financial results.
The results cover Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025, in both standalone and consolidated formats.

news.title: Anupam Rasayan's exports to the US faced impacts due to tariffs.
news.summary: Anupam Rasayan's exports to the US faced impacts due to tariffs.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan completes full acquisition of Jayhawk Fine Chemicals in the US.
The move boosts manufacturing, customer relations, and improves EPS from the start.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan completes full acquisition of Jayhawk Fine Chemicals in the US.
The move boosts manufacturing, customer relations, and improves EPS from the start.

news.title:
CRISIL assigned long-term rating of CRISIL A Watch Negative to Anupam Rasayan's Rs. 1369.8 crore bank loans.
Short-term rating of CRISIL A1 Watch Negative was also given, with negative implications.
news.summary:
CRISIL assigned long-term rating of CRISIL A Watch Negative to Anupam Rasayan's Rs. 1369.8 crore bank loans.
Short-term rating of CRISIL A1 Watch Negative was also given, with negative implications.

news.title:
India Ratings downgraded Anupam Rasayan India to IND AA- from IND AA+.
The negative outlook reflects concerns about the company's credit quality.
news.summary:
India Ratings downgraded Anupam Rasayan India to IND AA- from IND AA+.
The negative outlook reflects concerns about the company's credit quality.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd announced the audio recording of its investor call on the US acquisition update is available on its website.
The investor call was held on December 15, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. IST.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan India Ltd announced the audio recording of its investor call on the US acquisition update is available on its website.
The investor call was held on December 15, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. IST.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan to acquire Jayhawk Fine Chemicals for $150M, EV $134M.
Jayhawk's CY24 revenue $78M, EBITDA $15M; EV/EBITDA at 9x, boosting U.S. presence.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan to acquire Jayhawk Fine Chemicals for $150M, EV $134M.
Jayhawk's CY24 revenue $78M, EBITDA $15M; EV/EBITDA at 9x, boosting U.S. presence.

news.title:
Anupam Rasayan India approves $155M acquisition of Monitchem Kansas.
The deal aims to expand product offerings and strengthen market position.
news.summary:
Anupam Rasayan India approves $155M acquisition of Monitchem Kansas.
The deal aims to expand product offerings and strengthen market position.
